title: SWMS Matrix Row
description: One row of Table 2 — required SWMS by trade package, with submission, review and commencement hold points. The principal contractor reviews and accepts for commencement; it never 'approves'.

trade_package.description: Package name. Must match the name used in the HRCW Register and Risk Register.

scope_status.description: Whether this SWMS row is active scope, conditional scope, excluded scope or a stop-work referral only.

hrcw_refs.description: Confirmed HRCW categories this package performs. Every ref must be confirmed in the HRCW Register.

conditional_hrcw_refs.description: Conditional HRCW categories that trigger only if the final work method or site condition confirms them.

hrcw_conditions.description: Free-text qualifier where a category applies only conditionally (e.g. 'H06 where confined space confirmed; H07 where re-excavation >1.5 m').

swms_title.description: Title of the required SWMS. Must be consistent wherever this SWMS is referenced across the document set.

submitted_by.description: Subcontractor responsible for preparing the SWMS. Use '[Client To Confirm]' where the package is not yet awarded.

reviewed_by.description: Principal contractor role that reviews and accepts the SWMS for commencement (e.g. 'SD Group Site Manager'). Acceptance language only — never 'approves'.

required_before.description: The work that cannot commence until the SWMS is accepted.

hold_points.description: Hold point refs that gate this package. Every ref must exist in the Hold Point Schedule.

hold_point_notes.description: Verbatim hold-point wording for this package as it appears in the matrix cell. Must align with the Hold Point Schedule.

supporting_document_refs.description: Supporting document IDs required before issue, mobilisation or task commencement.

confirmation_item_refs.description: Confirmation item IDs that may change this SWMS row's scope or HRCW status.
